_comment_db_path: Path to your local Heptabase SQLite database. The Heptabase desktop app maintains this file. ~ is expanded. On macOS the default is shown below; do not change it unless you know yours differs.
_comment_base_output_dir: Where card_map cards are written. Paths inside card_map are relative to this directory. Use an absolute path.
_comment_board_output_dir: Where whitelisted-whiteboard cards are written (defaults to base_output_dir if omitted). Use an absolute path.
_comment_whitelist: Whiteboard-membership whitelist: whiteboard name -> destination. Only cards on each board's SURFACE are read; sub-whiteboards are NOT followed (add a sub-whiteboard's name here to include it). Destination value can be: (1) a relative path -> placed under board_output_dir; (2) an empty string -> board_output_dir root; (3) an absolute path -> a fixed home anywhere on disk (e.g. folding one board into a separate project). This map doubles as your routing index for where each board lands.
_comment_blacklist: Blacklist whiteboards: every card on these boards is excluded, and this wins over the whitelist (it catches a card placed on two boards by mistake). Cards here are subtracted before any title/content is read.
_comment_section: When true, board cards are further split into subfolders by their nested Heptabase section path (e.g. Exercise/Compound-lifts). Cards in no section land at the board folder root.
_comment_card_map: Title -> exact-path override layer (paths relative to base_output_dir). These titles are always synced regardless of which board they live on, and their path takes precedence over the whiteboard auto-naming above.
